title: Bounding eval awareness of ~human-level AI across the safe-to-dangerous shift
summary: Bounding eval awareness of ~human-level AI across the safe-to-dangerous shift
whyItMatters: In our last post , we argued that measuring evaluation awareness is fundamentally challenging because of the safe-to-dangerous distributional shift: we cannot directly measure the evaluation awareness of a model without deploying it, but we cannot safely deploy it until we know it is not scheming. We expect sufficiently superhuman AI will be eval aware, but…
